events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: caliper guide pins dry/seized on a brake job, rough-complete stage. This is non-compliant/defective. Guide pins must be lubricated with proper brake grease and move freely. Seized pins cause uneven pad wear, dragging, overheating, compromised braking. Decision: fail. Risk: high/critical. I'll say high. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 70. Confidence high.
